Broken Duck

About Services Products Resources

We Build Software for Education Companies

At Broken Duck Media, we build full-stack software solutions for education companies, course creators, and training platforms. Whether you need a mobile app, a custom learning dashboard, or backend tools to manage users and payments - we design, develop, and deploy everything from scratch to scale.

Foundation

Built for launching professional tools on a budget.

$3,500
  • Includes essential components for user authentication and access control
  • Mobile-responsive web frontend
  • Database setup with basic API routes
  • Email-based login system
  • Deployment on your own infrastructure
  • Comes with 2 Platinum, 5 Gold, and 5 Silver tier modules of your choice

Ideal for MVPs, internal dashboards, or admin tools. This package includes a robust default feature set plus 12 additional components across Silver, Gold, and Platinum tiers.

Launch

For startups, edtech teams, or tutors ready to scale.

$5,000
  • Includes: User roles (admin/student), uploads, email notifications
  • Multi-page dashboard with role-specific views
  • API backend using FastAPI, Node.js, or Firebase
  • Authentication with email and social login
  • Stripe or PayPal integration (1 gateway included)
  • Includes 3 Platinum, 7 Gold, and 7 Silver tier modules of your choice

Designed for production-ready platforms with payments, role-based views, and dynamic content handling. Ideal for growing startups and education teams.

Most Popular

Studio

Includes web & mobile — ready for the App Store.

$9,000
  • Includes all Launch features plus native push notifications
  • iOS and Android builds using React Native or Flutter
  • Support for in-app purchases or subscriptions
  • Offline-first capabilities with caching and sync
  • Advanced theming and branding customization
  • Includes 1 Diamond, 4 Platinum, 8 Gold, and 10 Silver tier modules of your choice

Built for mobile-first SaaS and public-facing platforms. Combines full Launch capabilities with cross-platform builds, native integrations, and deeper branding control.

Build

Custom-built architecture for orgs, agencies, or funded startups.

Custom
  • Includes: Admin tools, role management, security layer
  • Multi-tenant or white-label setup
  • Custom integrations (CRM, LMS, payment providers, AI engines)
  • Scalable backend with custom deployment workflows
  • Compliance-ready architecture (FERPA, GDPR, SOC2 prep)
  • Includes unlimited modules from all tiers based on consultation

Tailored for enterprise SaaS, edtech platforms, or complex integrations. Built from the ground up with your infrastructure, governance, and compliance needs in mind.

Ongoing Support & Maintenance

Launching your software is just the beginning. We offer continued support to keep your platform secure, fast, and evolving — whether that means fixing bugs, improving performance, or building new features over time.

Monthly support plans start at $100 and scale based on your needs. From small updates to long-term product partnerships, we’re here to support your growth.

Bug fixes and stability improvements
Performance tuning and security patching
Priority support for active clients
Add new features and modules as needed
Optional monthly check-ins or strategy calls
Get a Quote
